props.text: The Strategic Overview section provides high-level architecture documentation suitable for decision makers, technical leaders, and new team members seeking system-wide understanding.

props.text: Choose the documentation path that matches your role and responsibilities:

features.title: For CTOs & Technical Leaders
features.description: Security architecture overview, defense-in-depth patterns, technology selection rationale, and executive summaries

features.title: For Frontend Developers

features.title: For Content Teams
features.description: Content management workflows, dynamic zones usage, and publishing guidelines

features.title: For QA & Testing
features.description: Testing strategy, integration tests, E2E patterns, and quality gates

props.title: Production-Ready Architecture
props.body: This system implements enterprise patterns including guard architecture for hydration protection, 7-layer security defense, atomic design component system, and complete test coverage.
